hook: Not every good conversation needs a long texting phase before meeting.
body: Sometimes the cleanest way to preserve energy is to move toward a real-world plan before the thread gets overworked.

hook: Men often keep chatting because they think more messaging always equals better odds.
body: Use the app to establish enough signal, then let the date do the heavier relational work.

body: Once you know the tone feels easy and the curiosity is mutual, a simple plan can be more useful than another two days of banter.
